_source: IBC 2009/2018 Table 1806.2 — Presumptive Load-Bearing Values of Foundation Materials
_notes: Lateral bearing may be increased by tabular value per additional foot of depth (up to 15x). IBC 1806.3.4: isolated poles (fence posts) may use 2x lateral bearing for short-term loads.
